HOME ERIE'S NUTCRACKER REGIONAL DANCE AMERICA
HOME ERIE'S NUTCRACKER REGIONAL DANCE AMERICA

Inspiring Movement. Enriching Our Community.

This mission guides everything we do at Lake Erie Ballet Company.

Lake Erie Ballet Company is a not-for-profit organization dedicated to providing a high-quality pre-professional dance experience for dancers from local studios throughout the region. We welcome young artists to join us in creating inspiring performances for the Erie community. Through collaboration with Erie County schools and regional arts organizations, we strive to enrich the cultural landscape and nurture the next generation of performers.

Our Commitment

Founded in 1957 as Erie Civic Ballet, Lake Erie Ballet Company (LEBC) is committed to promoting the diversity of talent in Erie County by building partnerships with local dance organizations. All dancers who audition participate in a positive and inspirational learning environment where skilled training and mentorship are offered through exposure to professional artistic directors, rehearsal directors, designers, and backstage technicians.

An Erie Tradition

Dancers gain firsthand experience in the profession of dance through active participation in auditions and rehearsals that culminate in performances of the annual Erie tradition of The Nutcracker.

Lake Erie Ballet Company

Bringing performance, education, and community engagement through ballet to the Erie community.
